capabilities_used.evidence: 多次直接讲 deviation / spring / sweep。2024-10-29: "Beautiful breakout, re-test and spring. $80k imminent."；2024-01-29: "possible deviation into our $38,000 nPOC levels along with getting acceptance back into range." 图表也常画先扫低点再反转的路径。

他的框架核心就是 current range 上下沿交易。2025-09-30: "both of these setups play out on $BTC and $ETH going higher based on Current Ranges"；2025-06-26: "$ETH hasn't even started to dig into our nPOC levels within range above current price." 图片 5、8 都是在箱体/区间边界给出 buy zone 或 upper limit。
并非典型 SMC 全套，但有明显的供需区/盒子回测意识。图 5 在 ETH 4h 上画出蓝色 supply/resistance box，等价格进入区间做反应；图 8 也是上方明显供给区。
经常讲 acceptance back into range、支撑阻力角色切换。2026-01-31: "Either we run up and rejection recent support and it turns into resistance, or we get acceptance back into range"，这是典型破位后角色转换/接受-拒绝交易框架。

整体长期偏多。2025-01-29: "Bitcoin structure looks flawless... it really looks like it wants higher. I refuse to get bearish"；2024-08-20: "Weekly $BTC still looks pretty bullish to me. No reason to overthink it"；2026-04-05: "optimistic for a green week incoming."
他对 chop / range 的识别非常频繁。2024-07-31: "We've been ranging for 5 months"；2025-07-31: "Market chop continues sadly…"；2025-09-30: "Choppy conditions still among us right now."
不是无脑抄底，而是等 discounted levels 和结构确认。2025-01-23: "Would love a re-test of $91,794 nPOC level. I look to buy at discounted prices, not premiums." 说明他不追高、等回撤到计划位。

非常强调 exposure 与分层进场。2025-08-29: "You are only hurting right now if you are overexposed on position sizing."；2025-06-26: "DCA into levels of discounted price, and scaling out to the upside... It's not about going 'all in' or 'all out'"。
会明确承认错误并把风险放前面。2024-06-30: "Took a loss on an altcoin that was nuked -50%"；2024-04-30: "Added. Clenched. Risk in place. Walking away now."

他反复讨论 BTC.D 与山寨轮动。2025-09-29: "Bitcoin dominance going up doesnt mean your altcoins are getting crushed, just means Bitcoin is out performing them"；2025-02-26: "If $ETH and #Altcoins are going to gain any ground on $BTC it’s going to be during these times of downside."
不是他的主框架，但会用均线作为确认。2026-04-09: "$QQQ - Closed above the 200 day MA... Today it closed above the 100 DMA too." 说明他会把均线收复当作环境确认。
虽然不总是直接说 Wyckoff，但 spring、range low reclaim、假跌破回区间非常像吸筹语境。2024-10-29 的 "breakout, re-test and spring" 与多张图里的先扫低点再拉升路径都吻合。
对现货买盘/卖盘很敏感，虽不只限 ETF。2025-11-28: "Binance Spot $BTC selling has definitely slowed"；2026-02-26: "Binance and Coinbase spot $BTC bidding is holding up"。更像现货流代理变量。
衍生品不是主轴，但会观察仓位挤压与横盘后的突破条件。2025-09-29: "Bitfinex spot longs surged right before the $BTC 5% move up. What did they know?"
会回避在高位追多。2025-01-23: "It will always be hard for me to long at or around ATHs"；这是一种对高位抛物段末端风险的主观过滤。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: nPOC Retest Framework
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify naked Point of Control prints from prior volume profiles and use them as discounted re-entry or magnet targets. Bias strengthens when price revisits nPOC inside a broader range and shows acceptance/rejection.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别历史成交量分布留下的裸 POC（nPOC）价位，把它们当作回踩买点、反弹目标或价格磁吸位；若与当前区间上下沿重合，则优先级更高。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 几乎是他最鲜明的方法：2025-07-30 "$115,655 nPOC print hit. Now run it back up to $122,560"；2025-01-23 "Would love a re-test of $91,794 nPOC level"；2025-03-26 "Do we get the $80,347 nPOC re-test?"

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Range Acceptance / Rejection
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trade around whether price gains acceptance back into a prior range, rejects from the edge, or deviates beyond the boundary and snaps back. Focus is less on candle pattern and more on auction acceptance.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕价格是否重新被区间接纳、在边界被拒绝、或发生偏离后回归来交易，本质是拍卖市场里的接受/拒绝判断。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-01-31 "Either we run up and rejection recent support and it turns into resistance, or we get acceptance back into range"；2024-01-29 也直接提到 "getting acceptance back into range"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Discount vs Premium Bidding
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 折价区挂单、溢价区回避
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Prefer building size only at discounted zones inside a valid bullish structure; avoid initiating large longs at local highs or ATH unless forced by strong trend continuation evidence.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 只在看涨结构中的折价区逐步建仓，尽量不在局部高位或 ATH 附近重仓追多，除非有很强的趋势延续证据。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-01-23 "I look to buy at discounted prices, not premiums."；2025-06-26 "DCA into levels of discounted price, and scaling out to the upside"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Higher-Lows Defense
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Maintain bullish bias as long as successive higher lows remain intact, even if sentiment is bearish or price has not yet broken major resistance.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 只要抬高低点结构还在，即使市场情绪偏空、价格尚未突破关键阻力，也维持偏多判断。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-03-31: "Do we just ignore the higher lows on $ETH or what??"；图片 8 在 ETH 2h 上也明确标了连续抬高低点。

personal_quirks.quote: Plan the trade, trade the plan.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先定义价位和路径，再按预案执行，不随情绪和噪音改来改去。

personal_quirks.quote: I look to buy at discounted prices, not premiums.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 只在折价区找多，不在高位追价。

personal_quirks.quote: Perfect example of how I like to be trading  DCA into levels of discounted price, and scaling out to the upside  It's not about going "all in" or "all out" at one spot.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 偏好分批建仓、分批止盈，而不是单点梭哈。

personal_quirks.quote: You are only hurting right now if you are overexposed on position sizing. I feel nothing.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 把仓位做到能承受波动，情绪稳定来自合适风险暴露。

personal_quirks.quote: Never mistaken slow price action for market weakness.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 横盘和清淡并不自动等于转空，尤其节假日和区间环境里不要过度解读。

unique_traits: 他最有辨识度的不是传统形态学，而是把 nPOC、Current Range、acceptance/rejection 结合成一套非常可执行的区间拍卖框架。相比很多只讲宏观叙事的交易员，他更像是用“折价买入 + 裸 POC 磁吸 + 流动性扫单回归”来做中短周期 swing。另一个特点是长期偏多但不追高，嘴上很 bullish，执行上却强调分层挂单、等回踩、控制仓位。

high_conviction_phrases: really looks like it wants higher
not an area I am willing to get bearish at
buy the dip area for me
low_conviction_phrases: Not sure if we get it
